<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Get Enterprise SSO Organization by ID"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/projects/{project_id}/organizations/{organization_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

Deprecated: use getProject instead

Retrieves an Enterprise SSO Organization for a project by its ID
